context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements churn risk thresholds relative to individual purchase frequency, uses the correct RetentionScore interface fields, applies a sensible default for single-purchase customers, segments customers into the four expected groups with correct filter criteria, and excludes subscription customers from the scoring logic.

checklist.name: RetentionScore interface fields
checklist.description: The RetentionScore type/interface includes all of: customerId, churnRisk, daysSincePurchase, purchaseFrequency, expectedNextOrder, daysOverdue

checklist.name: churnRisk enum values
checklist.description: The churnRisk field is typed as 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'churned' (exactly these four values)

checklist.name: Frequency-relative thresholds
checklist.description: Churn risk levels are determined by multiples of purchase frequency: 'churned' when daysOverdue > frequency*2, 'high' when > frequency*1, 'medium' when > frequency*0.5, 'low' otherwise

checklist.name: Single-purchase default frequency
checklist.description: Customers with only one order are assigned a default purchase frequency of 60 days

checklist.name: Subscription customer exclusion
checklist.description: Subscription customers are explicitly excluded from churn scoring (e.g. filtered out before scoring or documented as excluded in DESIGN_NOTES.md)

checklist.name: highValueAtRisk segment
checklist.description: The highValueAtRisk segment filters for churnRisk==='high' AND customer LTV > 200

checklist.name: earlyWarning segment
checklist.description: The earlyWarning segment contains customers with churnRisk==='medium'

checklist.name: recentlyChurned segment
checklist.description: The recentlyChurned segment filters for churnRisk==='churned' AND daysSincePurchase < 90

checklist.name: oneTimeBuyers segment
checklist.description: The oneTimeBuyers segment filters for churnRisk==='medium' AND order count === 1 (not all one-time buyers, only medium-risk ones)

checklist.name: 45-day one-time buyer minimum
checklist.description: DESIGN_NOTES.md or code comments mention or implement the 45-day minimum window before treating a single-purchase customer as at-risk

checklist.name: Nightly scoring job and DB indexes
checklist.description: DESIGN_NOTES.md or code comments mention running the scoring job nightly and recommend database indexes on last_order_date and customer_id
